---
title: BsParser
subtitle: "valid'em"
execute:
  echo: false
---

> Validate an bsInput with bcv_wrapper

::: {#inputDiv}
<!-- inputDiv is considered Void-->
:::

```{ojs}
import { bsInputgroupTransform } from "./bsui.js"

import { BCVWrapper } from "./bsBcv.js";
//parser_lang = new BcvParserLang(); // native bcv_parser with lang
//parser_ref = new SuperParserRef(parser_lang.instance);
//parser_ref = new SuperParserRef();
//parser_ref.parse(ig_tfr.current).osis_array();

bcv = new BCVWrapper() // singleton parser

viewof refInput = new bsInputgroupTransform({
  prefixHTML: "<i class='bi bi-book'></i>",
  placeholder: "Enter Bible reference…",
  transform: bcv.parseOsis,     // <---- HERE
  addLabel: "Add",
  resetLabel: "RAZ",
  clipLabel: "CLIP"
}).node()

refInput.current
refInput
```
